name: GBT27930IL_BlockTxMessage
title: GBT27930IL_BlockTxMessage
syntax: long GBT27930IL_BlockTxMessage(dword pgn, dword destinationAddress, qword filterMask, qword filterValue); // form 1
description: Prevents transmitting of a message generated and sent by the interaction layer.
The message to block is specified by PGN, destination address and a part of the first eight data bytes.
To revert this command you can use GBT27930IL_ResetBlockedRxMessage or GBT27930IL_ResetAllBlockedTxMessages.

parameters.name: pgn
parameters.description: The message with this PGN shall be blocked.
